title: platostoma intermedium
intro: Platostoma intermedium, also known as Purple Platostoma, is a plant species in the mint family that is native to tropical regions of West Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils. The health benefits of Platostoma intermedium include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and even exhibit antitumor activity. Platostoma intermedium is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, and can also be found in some traditional herbal remedies in various parts of the world.
